decision_rationale: Concept mode requires current behaviour before introducing the concept. No transcript exists yet, so the strongest first move is a neutral, domain-specific prompt for the participant’s most recent portfolio-review behaviour.
message_to_persona: 你最近一次認真睇自己投資組合係幾時，當時發生咗咩事？
open_questions: 最近一次實際 portfolio review / monitoring 事件係乜
當時用咗咩方法、工具同 workaround
之後邊個 customer moment 最適合引入 Portfolio Health Check
對資料整合、提示、解釋同 RM 介面嘅信任邊界係乜
